title: AppConfig
description: Fail-fast runtime configuration. Every field is validated on startup; a missing required field aborts the process with a structured error. Loaders MUST report every problem in one shot, not one at a time.

resource_group.description: Default matches deploy-and-onboard.md § Resource Naming Convention.

region.description: Azure region short-name, e.g. 'krc', 'weu'. No customer-identifying value.

llm.description: LLM binding mode + optional resolved-models pointer. Governs which composition-root bindings are used (deterministic fake vs Azure adapter). See docs/roadmap/deployment/dev-and-deploy-parity.md § Parity Contract.

mode.description: 'local-fake' binds deterministic in-memory implementations (default in dev). 'azure' loads resolved-models.json and binds the Azure OpenAI adapters.

resolved_models_path.description: Filesystem path or KV secret name pointing at the resolved-models.json emitted by the bootstrap resolver. REQUIRED when mode=azure.

capabilities.description: Capability names the process expects to bind. MUST mirror the llm-registry.yaml. Duplicates fail-close at load time.

t2_primary_latency_routing.description: Latency routing of the T2 primary proposer among its same-publisher candidate pool (invariant-safe). Enforced on by default; takes effect only when resolved-models.json carries >= 2 reasoner_primary_candidates. Set false to pin the single most-preferred primary. See docs/roadmap/architecture/llm-strategy.md T2 Primary Latency Pool.
